action_set_definitions.name: get_environmental_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current values of all water quality sensors and fish health metrics. Must be called before any corrective action.

action_set_definitions.name: adjust_alkalinity
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a buffering agent (e.g., sodium bicarbonate) to the system to increase pH and restore alkalinity levels, which is necessary to restart biological filtration in a stalled cycle.

buffer_amount_kg.description: The quantity of buffering agent to add.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_water_exchange
action_set_definitions.description: Replaces a portion of the tank water with fresh, conditioned water. This reduces ammonia concentration and increases water levels.

exchange_percentage.description: The percentage of total water volume to replace (0-100).

action_type.description: Whether to perform a full exchange or simply add water to reach depth.

action_set_definitions.name: update_feeding_regime
action_set_definitions.description: Adjusts the quantity of feed provided to the fish. Reducing feed lowers the production of metabolic waste (ammonia).

feed_ration_percentage.description: The percentage of the standard ration to feed (0 = fast/no feeding).

action_set_definitions.name: wait_and_monitor
action_set_definitions.description: Allows time to pass for the biological filter to process chemicals or for fish health to stabilize. Returns the state after the duration.

duration_hours.description: Number of hours to wait before the next observation.

state_description.water_temperature: The current temperature of the water in degrees Celsius.
state_description.dissolved_oxygen: Concentration of oxygen dissolved in the water (mg/L).
state_description.ph_level: The pH level of the water (0-14 scale).
state_description.ammonia_level: Concentration of total ammonia nitrogen in the water (mg/L).
state_description.nitrate_level: Concentration of nitrates in the water (mg/L).
state_description.fish_health_index: An aggregate score representing the overall health of the fish stock (0-100).
state_description.water_level: The current depth or volume percentage of the tank.
state_description.last_feeding_time: Hours elapsed since the last feeding event.
